candidate_definition_hints.text: Accelerate SHA256 computations in pure Go using  AVX512, SHA Extensions for x86 and ARM64 for ARM. On AVX512 it provides an up to 8x improvement (over 3 GB/s per core). SHA Extensions give a performance boost of close to 4x over native.
Accelerate SHA256 computations in pure Go using AVX512, SHA Extensions for x86 and ARM64 for ARM.
